description_long: This object is a tall, slender street light with a single, gently curved pole supporting a streamlined, modern lamp head. The pole is metallic and unadorned, with a smooth, uniform surface and a slight bend near the top where it extends outward to hold the lamp. The lamp head is elongated and oval-shaped, with a flat underside and a slightly domed top, likely housing an LED or similar light source. The base of the pole appears to be square and robust, designed for secure installation into the ground. The overall design is minimalist and functional, suitable for contemporary urban environments such as city streets, sidewalks, or parking lots. There are no visible decorative elements or embellishments on either the pole or the lamp head.
description: A tall, modern street light with a smooth, curved metallic pole and a streamlined, oval lamp head. The design is minimalist and functional, ideal for urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view shows the street light as a thin vertical line with the lamp head appearing as a small oval at the top.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the gentle curve of the pole and the elongated, oval lamp head extending outward.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the straight length of the pole with the lamp head seen from behind, appearing circular and minimal.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlights the outward curve of the pole and the lamp head's streamlined profile.
attribute_lamp_head_design: Modern, streamlined oval lamp head with a flat underside and slightly domed top, no visible decorative elements or diffusers.
